sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this puzzle-platformer

special_mechanics.name: Object Manipulation
special_mechanics.description: Toad can pick up individual objects or lift entire stacks and place them elsewhere in the playing field. Can kick objects across the play field and scurry up the sides of stacks to retrieve specific objects.

special_mechanics.name: Climbing
special_mechanics.description: Toad can climb up the sides of stacks of objects to reach items at higher positions

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No physics parameters documented in available sources. This is primarily a puzzle game where Toad navigates and manipulates objects rather than a platformer focused on movement mechanics. Sources contain only gameplay and regional difference information, not physics data.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Wario's Woods (NES)
